task_params.title: Schenectady Community Art Space Long-Range Plan
vision_points: quiet creative space for youth, seniors, and mental health support
free or low-cost workshops and open studio hours
include art therapy-informed programming and peer support
build local partnerships with schools, libraries, and community groups
funding_points: sliding-scale class fees for some programs
